calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp1033.5 & Ccp685.040
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc's Motion For Award Of Post-Judgment Attorney's Fees Pursuant To C.C. 1717, C.C.P. 1033.5 and C.C.P. 685.040 is granted in the amount of $2,010. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Enforce Judgment W/ Memo Of P & An And Declaration
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Haider Gardini, for Ali Naim Gardizi aka Mali Naim Gardizi Defendant and Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Enforce Judgment. Plaintiff's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Enforce Judgment is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
